title: dahlia frustranea
side_effects: Dahlia frustranea can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness in individuals who consume it as a tea or infusion, due to its high concentration of volatile oils. Ingestion of large quantities can also lead to stomach upset, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, skin irritation and allergic reactions may occur in people who come into contact with the plant's sap or extracts, causing redness, itching, and blistering. Improper use of dahlia frustranea can also interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and exacerbate underlying health conditions.
